title: Weak Measurements: Gentle Probing of Quantum Systems
description: Master weak measurements - a powerful technique for extracting partial information from quantum systems with minimal disturbance. Learn about weak values, amplification effects, and applications to quantum foundations and metrology.
learningObjectives: Understand the weak measurement formalism and interaction model
Calculate weak values for pre- and post-selected systems
Explain weak value amplification and its applications
Analyze the role of weak measurements in quantum foundations
Design weak measurement experiments for metrology
